title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: High Risk, High Reward
content:
There’s a weekly bonus for the first Primary Target sold after completing The Kortz Center Heist each week. Subsequent playthroughs will saturate the market though, leading to buyer fatigue and decreased payouts.

This same principle also now applies to other Heists and activities available throughout Los Santos, so make sure to shake up your routine and mix things up by experiencing the full assortment of activities GTA Online has to offer.
